use_cases: Form selection controls where users need to mark items as complete or selected
Agreement checkboxes for terms of service or newsletter signups
Filter selection in data tables or e-commerce product filters
Task completion indicators in project management interfaces
ai_summary: A minimalist checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with a checkmark icon indicator. Features standard focus states, disabled state handling, and accessible keyboard navigation. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling with ring focus indicators and proper state management via data attributes.
